headline: Gold Just Had Its Worst Quarter in 13 Years, and GDX Might Be the Contrarian Rebound Nobody’s Talking About
summary: Gold miners just got taken to the woodshed. The VanEck Gold Miners ETF (NYSEARCA:GDX) shed 21% in the second quarter of 2026, sliding from $96 in early April to roughly $75 by June 30, one of the ugliest three-month stretches for the sector in over a decade. Yet GDX is still up almost 50% over ... Gold Just Had Its Worst Quarter in 13 Years, and GDX Might Be the Contrarian Rebound Nobody’s Talking About

headline: Jefferies Maintains Buy on Newmont, Lowers Price Target to $146
summary: Jefferies  analyst Fahad Tariq   maintains Newmont (NYSE:NEM) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $158 to $146.
